title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 273.010 - Dog defined
text:
273.010.  Dog defined. — The word "dog", as used in sections 273.010 to 273.030, shall be held and construed to mean all animals of the canine species, both male and female.
(RSMo 1939 § 14537) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12863; 1919 § 4353; 1909 § 857
